creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is the list of the user in available in bugzilla corresponding to mailing list which are being decomissioned:
- freebsd-atm
- freebsd-bugbusters
- freebsd-firewire
- freebsd-isdn
- freebsd-proliant
- freebsd-sparc64
- freebsd-vuxml

Would it be possible to at least disable those accounts?
